vegetarian) for the DAILY group allowance

# SERVING SIZES per food group — ICMR-NI: #   and the worked sample meal plans (p. ~1231) for the PER-MEAL serving
# This replaces INDB medians for the CORE groups. INDB is a corpus of textbook recipes
# median counts an ingredient's share of a mixed dish — which put a dal serving at 12 g against
# ICMR's 25-30 g. For aromatics and condiments ICMR says nothing and INDB is still the source.
# daily_g = the group's whole-day allowance. serving_g = one meal's worth
# guideline's own meal plans. quote = the exact text the serving is taken from.

column4: Rice (100g) or Phulka (100g) at lunch; Rice or Phulka (60g) at dinner
Pulses (30g) at lunch; Red gram or chana (25g) (1/2 cup) at dinner
400g of vegetables (GLV: 100g; Other vegetables: 250g; Roots and tubers: 50g)
Fruits 100g at lunch; Fruit 50g at dinner
Nuts (almond walnut peanut & other nuts) and oilseeds (Sesame etc.) (20g)
Chicken/meat/eggs 70g per day (non-veg plate); one egg is ~50 g edible
Oil 15g at lunch; Oil 10g at dinner
sugar must be restricted to 25-30 grams per day
